class.name: OTelExporterFile
class.brief_description: Writes OTel signal batches to local JSON files.
class.description: Exports spans, metrics, and logs from an [OTelState] to files under [member output_directory].

method.name: ensure_directory_exists
method.description: Creates [member output_directory] if it does not already exist.

method.name: export_logs
method.description: Writes all logs in [param state] to a file; returns an [enum Error].

method.name: export_metrics
method.description: Writes all metrics in [param state] to a file; returns an [enum Error].

method.name: export_traces
method.description: Writes all spans in [param state] to a file; returns an [enum Error].

method.name: generate_filename
method.description: Returns a filename for [param type] ("traces", "metrics", or "logs") using [member filename_prefix] and the current [member mode].

constants.constant: Appends new records to an existing file.
Overwrites the file on every export.
Creates a new timestamped file on every export.
